title: Phase 7C: Delivery backend - service, driver session, API routes, socket events
description: Build delivery backend: delivery service (stop management, POD processing, COD processing, route completion), driver session service, delivery API routes, and Socket.io events for real-time delivery tracking.
steps: Create src/lib/services/delivery.service.ts with stop management, POD receipt processing, COD collection processing, route completion logic
Create src/lib/services/driver-session.service.ts with driver session management (start/end shift, active route tracking)
Create src/app/api/delivery/stops/[id]/route.ts with stop status updates
Create src/lib/socket-events/delivery.ts with real-time events (stop-completed, driver-location-updated, route-completed)
